//: Claude Code: multiple kubernetes-mcp instances, one per zone. 'type':'http' is required. See docs/auth.md §4 for how OIDC client config depends on Dynamic Client Registration (DCR).

k8s-tools.//: OIDC via Authentik (no DCR): give the pre-registered public client_id + the provider's OIDC discovery URL. Browser login on first use; run: claude mcp login k8s-tools.

k8s-keycloak.//: OIDC via a DCR-capable provider (e.g. Keycloak): just the URL — the client self-registers.
